properties.Name: This tunnel leads to Pasila. Some graffiti inside.

Mukavia kortteleita vanhassa työläiskaupunginosassa.

Cozy streets and old wooden houses. Around here and to down and left.

Täydellisessä tuulensuojassa oleva nurkkaus Tuomiokirkon kupeessa. Kesälämpötiloja jo keväällä.

Best Pinball cave in Finland.

More than 20 pinball machine´s to play, whit just 15 €. No alcohol service so BYOB.

properties.Name:
There's a forest path down to the tunnels from Åminnentie 272. 
---
Åminnentie 272 kohdalta lähtee metsäpolku alas tunneleille. Kyseisessä kohdassa on metsäpapaikoitusalue, jonka päädystä lähtee polku alas kohden Pohjanpitäjän lahtea.

properties.Name: A nice hill with a nice view. Especially beautiful at night.

properties.Name: The best place for day drinking (pussikaljat) during summer. Meet a lot of locals and enjoy the sun. You can buy food or drinks from the nearby S-market store. Sometimes the church is open for visiting (and a bathroom)
properties.description: Kirkkopuisto Park

properties.Name: There are a couple of theatres, a ballet, an art school and other kinds of culture happenings. Also some graffiti.

properties.Name: From local students, drinks also available.

properties.Name: The best outside bar during summer.
properties.description: Jokiasema restaurant

properties.Name: A really nice place to hangout during summer. Might be crowded from time to time.
properties.description: Kuhasalo Campfire place (a legal one)

properties.Name: During the evening there's people smoking weed here, or so I've heard. Also teenagers drinking.
properties.description: A place for drinking (or stair workouts)

properties.Name: This is a real gem in this small city in Finland. Amazing cafe/restaurant on an old fishing island underneath the train bridge, which was built in the 1930s. Definitely a place worthwhile for a visit during Summer!
properties.description: Café Kailas

properties.Name: A cool place to to hangout.
properties.description: Amphibious theater

properties.Name: Nice little spot to stop while driving. Nice view to the lake.
properties.description: Pysähdyspaikka järvenrannalla

properties.Name: Two historical escape rooms in a 200 years old rectory. Available in Finnish and English. https://pappilanpidot.fi/escape-rooms/

properties.Name: You can cath some pretty amazing sunsets from here! I recomend you to come here on the summer time.

properties.description: Kurkisaari

properties.description: Keuruu old wooden church

properties.Name: So somewhere here is an old tower. You can climb on top of it and gaze at the gorgeus view. Eli täällä jossain on vaaran päälle rakennettu palotorni joka on suljettu. Täällä näkee upeimmat maisemat.
Interesting community of artists, thinkers and individuals with ecological views. https://www.keuruunekokyla.fi/en/

properties.Name: Caffee
properties.description: Kahvila Saha

properties.Name: Tiny ice cream booth open during the summertime.
properties.description: Ice cream

properties.Name: Starting point of a ice road for walkers and skaters. Not for cars!
properties.description: Ice road

properties.Name: Several large caves, ravines, trenches. Abandoned cottages by more recent homeless forest dwellers. Be careful where you step.
properties.description: WWI Bunkers

properties.Name: Yeah, it's a regular neighborhood kiosk, but the speciality of it is that it's not part of the ever expanding R-Kioski chain with criminal prices. It's a place where the Northern Hyvinkää goes for a ice cream, where locals pick up their morning coffee when going to work. It's a kiosk where the junkies from Paavola and the rich moms from Vieremä are chatting casually about society. The owner knows your name and asks how's your work. It's an amazing joint to pop in. It's something that connects up people. Also there's a minigolf track. Occasionally the City of Hyvinkää wants to redevelope the area for private housing projects, but thankfully these plans have forgotten and this special part of casual living has stayed in place.
properties.description: Vaiveronkatu kiosk

properties.Name: A picturesque pedestrian-only bridge on the strait, boats occasionally pass underneath.
properties.description: Aunessilta bridge

properties.Name: Tall waterfall in the forest (18 meters), free to explore!
A ski jumping tower where a lot of teenagers climb and take pictures.
properties.description: Lukonmäen mäkihyppytorni

properties.Name: Here you can see e.g. Iidesjärvi, Nekala and water tower of Hervanta.
properties.description: Old air defense hill

properties.Name: Old barracks
properties.description: Vanha kasarmialue

properties.Name: The old Kyläsaari waste incineration plant, now the best secondhand center in Finland - hurry up to see, it will be torn down in a few years
properties.description: Kyläsaari

properties.Name: Vanhan ajan kuppila, jossa on edelleen puukoille oma narikka. Pubin kanta-asiakkaat koostuvat iäkkäämmästä ja ehkä jopa hieman kapeakatseisista asiakkaista. Turistit, olkaa varovaisia. - Old school pub, where there is a place for customers' knives. Regular customers consist of elderly and bit more narrow-minded people. Tourists, be careful.
properties.description: Pub Härmän Häjy

properties.Name: Place for skateboarders and graffiti artists. Free skating area for everybody and legal spots for graffitis.

properties.description: Pääkaupunkiseudun I maailmansodan linnoitteet

properties.Name: An island with charming path through the island into its north-eastern corner. Very nice view on top of the cliff. You can get here from Rönö island. There is a wooden bridge to Varvisaari island.
properties.description: Varvisaari

properties.Name: Prison in the middle of apartment buildings.
properties.description: Helsingin vankila

properties.Name: Good view all the way to Kaisaniemi.
properties.description: Photography spot

properties.Name: Käärmeluoto
properties.description: Läntinen Käärmeluoto

properties.Name: Pond
properties.description: Haukkalampi

properties.Name: An iconic café in Munkkiniemi, with an old time feel. In the summers you can enjoy your coffee and pastries on the terrace.
properties.description: Max's Café

properties.Name: A perfect place to spend a day in the sun in the summer. A decent sized sandy beach, playgrounds for the kids and an kiosk selling ice cream when it gets too hot. If you like hiking, there are a couple of nice trails nearby as well. There's also an outdoor gym close to the beach.
properties.description: Munkkinemi Beach

properties.Name: Erik Bryggman's last work, a water tower next to the local swimming facility. The main attraction here's a reggae themed bar on the top of it, from which you can get a great view over the whole city.
properties.description: Cafe Bar Torni

properties.Name: Statue of a dude forming glass by glassblowing. Woah. A nice little viewpoint towards the center of the city, although not very high.
properties.description: Lasinpuhaltajapatsas

properties.Name: One of the oldest cinemas in Finland. Still shows movies, albeit usually older ones or those not shown in your usual chain theaters.
properties.description: Kino Sampo

properties.Name: Old fortress site from viking age
properties.description: Pirunlinna Castle

properties.Name: The "duck park", named so because there's a small pond in the smack of it that ducks at least used to inhabit. The whole park was renovated recently (as of 2019), so it could be a bit barren at the moment. Still a good place to bring your kids to play, or admire the weird ass statues nearby.
properties.description: Ankkapuisto

properties.Name: The heart of the city, so to say. Usual meeting spot for people of all ages. There are nice bars and places to eat all around it.
properties.description: Granitin aukio

properties.Name: Since the city's heavily marketed as a railway city, I saw this as a crucial spot to point out. You probably have gone through this place, if you've ever traveled Finland from north to south or vice versa. Just don't go to Matkakeskus below, since it's almost totally empty and inhabited by either kids skipping school or drunks & junkies.
properties.description: Riihimäen rautatieasema

properties.Name: A holiday center just on the outskirts of Riihimäki. The area is surrounded by six ponds and in the region there are 20 log cabins, 140 caravan lots, tent spots, beaches, a salmon pond, private saunas and a restaurant. You can enjoy your time in Lempivaara by swimming, playing miniature golf, tennis, darts or petanque. Lempivaara has 20 different-sized log cabins, 140 caravan lots and tent spots.
properties.description: Matkailukeskus Lempivaara

properties.Name: The prison of Riihimäki, holding the most notorious inmates of Finland.
properties.description: Riihimäen vankila

properties.Name: A popular dance hall. Quite comfy, has that Finnish small-town feel of ye good ol' days.
properties.description: Riutanharju

properties.Name: largest selection of Finnish handcraft beers
properties.description: Ravintola Mullikka

properties.Name: If you are into Pokemon Go! This is your place. Nerd.
properties.description: Susisaari

properties.Name: As the jingle says, Doing Land is the best place, Doing Land is happy. In other words, it's an amusement park near a lake. Neat.
properties.description: Puuhamaa

properties.Name: Literally translated "Miina's pit", named so since down the hill there used to live a woman named Pit-Miina. Huh. Anyway, it holds a stand for audiences to come and see the local summer theatre showings.
properties.description: Miinan monttu

properties.Name: Mukava torni rovaniemen keskustan ylitse avautuvalla näköalalla. Myös oiva paikka nuotiohommiin halkoja löytyy paikanpäältä.

properties.Name: peaceful island for a walk or a picnic and few beers
properties.description: Mini-island chill spot

properties.Name: A skatepark with a big park around it. Good for picnics and skating
properties.description: Hollihaka (skate)park

properties.Name: Biggest park in Oulu. Great spots for picnics or just wandering around with friends. Very chill nature
properties.description: Ainolan puisto

properties.Name: A public sauna-raft open in the summertime. Nice way to spend an evening. Tix: 5€ bring your own towel
properties.description: Kesän Sauna

properties.Name: Modern café in the heart of old Munkkiniemi. Offers really good cakes and coffee, as well as pastries, pies etc. On weekdays you can eat a light lunch (soup + salad) and in the weekends brunch is served. There's a seating area outside as well.
properties.description: Cafe Tarina

properties.Name: Syksyisin tai auringon laskiessa mahtavat näkymät. Visit during fall or sunset for a nice view.

properties.Name: See the landscape over Southern Ostrobothnia.

properties.Name: Every junkie in 50km radius gathers here.

properties.Name: Large-ish bridge you can crawl under and watch the sunset while drinking beer for example

properties.Name: A super spot for picnics. Big lawns, lots of peaceful nooks and sun all day long.

properties.Name: A little bridge with many "love locks" on it.

properties.Name: A coastal battery fortification built for the First World War. At the time of its construction all the trees were cut down around it, but nowadays it's in the middle of a dense forest. Be careful and bring a flashlight!
properties.description: Skatanniemen patteri

properties.Name: It's just a huge rock. Crazy man-hypnotist-cult-leader Ior Bock insisted it's a temple and got his followers to try to excavated. Also arranged raves in the forest...
Lovely little beach (child friendly because of low water)
properties.description: Tiny beach

properties.Name: A scenic viewpoint point offering a nice view over the harbor and the archipelago.
properties.description: Horisontti-näköalatasanne

properties.Name: Old mine where the water is clear and emerald color
properties.description: Syrjän laguuni

properties.Name: An artificial hill over 60 meters tall, landscaped with love into a nice recreational area with lots of flora and fauna. May be a windy place, but offers a fantastic view over Helsinki. Bring binoculars for an even better view.

properties.Name: Sighseeing tower where you can see view of beautiful lake-finland
properties.description: Pääskyvuoren näkötorni

properties.Name: The deepest canal in Finland
properties.description: Varistaipaleen kanava

properties.Name: The only orthodox nun-monastery in the nordics.
properties.description: Lintulan luostari

properties.Name: Orthodox monastery
properties.description: Valamon luostari

properties.Name: A hill with a nice view over Helsinki. Located in an area with lots of paths for jogging or just walking in forests -- or skiing, if you happen to visit in winter time.
properties.description: Paloheinän huippu

properties.Name: Take off your shoes, roll up your trouser legs (or wear shorts!) and just wade some 150 meters to this small island. The underwater path may contain sharp rocks but is otherwise safe for everyone: you don't need to be afraid that you misstep and drown. The island features sand, some small trees, and rocks with messages that some people have scratched on them, even decades ago.
properties.description: Sisä-Hattu

properties.Name:
This is where Helsinki was founded in 1550. 90 years later the city center was moved to its present location due to the narrow and shallow waters which were too hard to navigate for bigger navy vessels.
---
Helsinki perustettiin kesäkuussa 1550 tässä paikassa. 90 vuotta myöhemmin kaupungin keskusta siirrettiin nykyiseen sijaintiinsa, sillä alkuperäisen sijainnin joen suistossa ja lahden alueella oli liian matala ja kallioinen kallio suurempiin merivoimien purjealuksiin. Vanha paikka tämän muistomerkin ympärillä hylättiin.
Tämä sijainti ei ole kaukana Arabia Centeristä. Myös pieni vesiputous on 200 metrin päässä.
properties.description: Helsinki was founded here / Kustaa II Aadolfin maapäivien obeliski

properties.Name: Get your high quality hipster coffee in this lovely little cafe in an old stable. Kitschy yet charming interior, and for a wonderful juxtaposition of oppressive corporation and old time charm, sit outside and gaze at the row of wooden houses on one side and the HQ of a massive bank on the other.
properties.description: Päiväkahvibaari

properties.Name: A great cafe with good salmon soup. Great view form the windows
properties.description: tervaspää

properties.Name: A nice park for 2-10 year old kids. there is also a good size skate park next to it
properties.description: Angry birds park

properties.Name: A nice small villa with a nature walk around it. There is a good bird tower here also.

Entrance to a cave. It is an unfinished bombshelter from 1940's. The entrance is blocked with big rocks, but you can climb over and enter the cave. A powerful flashlight is recommended when exploring.
https://yle.fi/uutiset/3-7404697

Aivan ihana paikka katsoa auringonlaskua ja fiilistellä horisontissa aukeavaa Helsinkiä.

Such a wonderful place to watch the sunset and view Helsinki in the horizon.

properties.Name: Good for bouldering

properties.Name: This is definitely one of the spookiest places in Finland. There are 560 human sculptures made by Veijo Rönkkönen here. Used false teeth were used aswell.

This place is really middle of nowhere. When you come here look out... there might be chickens, cats, dogs or children on the way.                             And the most important thing is to keep beach clean and nice for others!
properties.description: Vallijärvi lake

properties.Name: Has the best sugar doughnuts and ambience at summertime. At terrace you can see beautiful sailboats, yachts and meet "Ukis" most arrogant birds.                                                                               Nice outdoor playground for kids too!

properties.Name: A big ass castle not far from the city center.

properties.Name: You can give them little grass, leafs or dry bread.  Sheep are there only at summertime.                   Visit Laitilan Wirvoitustehdas factory shop too. They make refreshing drinks.

properties.Name: Indoor and outdoor museum, which consists of the dugouts and forts made by Germans in the 1940s. Really nice!

properties.Name: Cool island. A lot of history and great views over the sea. Some restaurants and cafés, and more "wild nature" than on Suomenlinna Island. There's a small beach also. You can get to Vallisaari by boat from the Market Square.
properties.description: Vallisaari

properties.Name: Rapids of Halinen. The area looks beautiful in summer

properties.Name: Nice views over Pyhäjärvi and a nice garden with alot of flower and beautiful trees. Good place To chill and drink beer at summer

properties.Name: Time travelling in Pyynikki
properties.description: On this plot near to city center of Tampere, you can take part in creative activities. For example, you can paint for free or grow plants. You may also want to visit the laboratory of a mad scientist. I won't reveal it any further, but definitely worth a visit.

properties.Name: Kaskisaaren silta. Cool lowkey bridge to jump from during summer
properties.description: From the rail about 5,5-7m. Has a little boat traffic so have to be careful when jumping

properties.Name: Tukkisaari
properties.description: Here is a decent fireplace. Beautiful and peaceful place whole year. You can rent kayaks here at summer. (http://kc.fi/index.php/kurssit-ja-palvelut/vuokraus)

properties.Name: Chill grilling spot
properties.description: Catches the evening sun well and has 2-3 grills inside tables

properties.Name: Best home made bread
properties.description: Have to pick up on sunday

properties.Name: Timin mänty (Timi's pine)
properties.description: 400-year old pine located at Hämeenkyrö. Important attraction for the locals, they have to tell about it every time you visit there.

properties.Name: Koisjärven disko
properties.description: Legendary red barn with the graffiti "Koisjärven disko" written on the side of it. It was seen on the movie "pahat pojat" for example. Legendaarinen "koisjärven disko" graffiti joka pahat pojat elokuvassakin nähdään.

properties.Name: Ducks and a nice view
properties.description: You can usually see a lot of ducks in here.

properties.Name: Pub Portti
properties.description: Common meeting place among uni students, lots of board games and great place to watch passing pedestrians.

properties.Name: Sightseeing spot
properties.description: One of my favourite views of Turku. Come here when sun is going down, you won't be disappointed!

properties.Name: Kuuvannokka cliff
properties.description: Beautiful place to drink a couple of beers or coffee and spot swans. You can also walk here by the nature rail.

properties.Name: Mummified body of Nicolaus Rungius, the vicar of Keminmaa during 1560 - 1629
Memorial and remains of Finland's largest prison camp during the 1941 - 1944 Continuation War
Näsijärvi view
properties.description: Beautiful view of lake Näsijärvi!

properties.Name: Halliluoto
properties.description: The last Finnish island you can see on Helsinki-Tallinn ship route before arriving to Tallinn. You can spot this island when you are on a cruise and it can be recognised from its small size and the 2 weird towers on the island

properties.Name: Terassitalo (Terracehouse)
properties.description: Just a regular apartment building, but with a really unique and cool architecture. If you go to Pikku-Huopalahti or drive past the area, you will notice the tall colourful building with the terraces.

properties.Name: Deepwater beach on the delta of Kemijoki river
entrance to tunnel under the bridge
properties.description: very long and big tunnel inside of motorway bridge. you can walk all the way across to salmisaari. other side entrance might sometimes be locked

properties.Name: graffiti gallery
properties.description: daytime spot in sompasaari

properties.Name: very nice hangout spot
properties.description: good view and a nice bench. there is also a small tunnel nearby that you can explore. there used to be a public sauna here.

properties.Name: junk yard
properties.description: cool junk yard. watch out for worker that looks like a elf. legend says he once tore the ears off a youngster that was doing graffiti in his junk yard.

properties.Name: Hasa
properties.description: A quarry filled with really clear water. Nice place to swim. Possibility to jump from rock to water. The stones at the bottom are scary because they are really clearly visible.

properties.Name: Takomäen louhos
properties.description: Cool place to swim. You can jump from about 5m, 10m and 12m to water. Campfire place nearby.

properties.Name: Cool water
properties.description: Strange blue water, I might not go swimming, but some go.

properties.Name: Malmi Airport
properties.description: If you want to try flying, here you can get discovery flights soon again. Center of finnish aviation community. Malmi4ever!

properties.Name: Tuurin Kyläkauppa
properties.description: One of the Finland’s most popular shopping centers. Owner Vesa Keskinen is very big showman playboy.

properties.Name: siperia diy
properties.description: small diy skatepark beside the train tracks, demolished as of 2022 due to concerns of being too close to the railway track

properties.Name: Nummela Standard Baseline
properties.description: 864 metres long standard baseline that was used for rangefinder calibrations. The line is marked with several pillars. It's built on top of a esker, where the gravel and sand soil stays steady through temperature variations.

properties.Name: Aulangon näkötorni
properties.description: A nice watchtower with beautiful views.

properties.Name: Cliff jumping spot
properties.description: you can swim there and jump from cliffs to water

properties.Name: the ruins of the old church
The Old Pit Bar / Vanha Monttu
properties.description: If you want to experience the most auhtentic bar in Tampere city, this is the place to be. Here you can encounter suits and punks alike. Be careful for Tuesdays tho, then it's karaoke time and "Pienen pojan elämää" plays on a non-stop loop.

properties.Name: OLD Lime stone Mine
properties.description: Absolutely amazing place to swim in summer . water is super clear and there are old mining buildings on island . there are even lobsters living on this old mine waters

properties.Name: Cliffside to check the views
properties.description: This is great places to hang out with friends. There are great views over Turku and a table to sit by. Approach from the South.

properties.Name: Bird tower
properties.description: Nice place to go and take couple of beers

properties.Name: Old mine (swim place)
properties.description: Good place to swim on summer , there can be pretty much people same time if u go on warm day

properties.Name: Old mine (swim place)
properties.description: Good place to swim on hot summer days, take couple beers with u

properties.Name: K-Citymarket Kupittaa
properties.description: If you grave a good sandwitch or sallad for evening chills with freinds in the near park any time of the day, this is the place.

properties.Name: public beach
properties.description: Local public beach where you can go swim , there is restaurant nearby too (300M and open only on summers)

properties.Name: Great summer place to visit
properties.description: couple restaurants and some people around , only on summers .... sometimes can be litle festivals or bands playing music

properties.Name: Beautiful sunset
properties.description: You can see whe  sun sets over turku

properties.Name: Naantalis "Hollywood"
properties.description: Nice view to sea and ukkopekkas bridge

properties.Name: Haunisten allas,  grillikatos
properties.description: Nice place where you can grill if there is any wood , i suggest to bring your own wood

properties.Name: Taivassalos sandbank , hiekkasärkä
properties.description: Small sandbank , usually you cant see shore but i promise there is very shallow and sand bottom. you only can arrive with boat but only with small motor boat up to 100hp if u have trimmable motor . even most of locals wont know this place . but its only good in summers

properties.Name: Restaurant kuunari
properties.description: Good local restaurant (open only on summers)

properties.Name: Nice boating place
properties.description: Beautiful place on hot summerdays , take couple beers and grill with you and enjoy

properties.Name: Restaurant vaihela
properties.description: u can arrive with boat or ferry , very beautifull old farm restaurant . if i remember they have camping places too

properties.Name: Kahiluodo´s bridge
properties.description: On hot summer nights when sun sets beautifull place

properties.Name: ost
properties.description: It's a drinking place. There's a table with a carved "Official Smoking Table" -text.

properties.Name: Oldest tree in area and stone field
properties.description: Over 400 years old tree. Tree has survived many forest-fires. 100 metres uphill is big stone field, made by ice during ice-age

properties.Name: Civil war execution place
properties.description: During finnish civil war 1918, few reds were dropped here from train and shot

properties.Name: Old wolf trap pit
properties.description: Old pit, where wolfs were hunted. Deep covered hole in ground, and small cage standing in middle. Cage would be filled with chicken and wolf who tries to get the chicken would drop to the hole.

properties.Name: Old quarry
properties.description: Old stone quarry -  now filled with clear swimmable water. It is forbidden to swim here, but nobody really cares and you will not get caught.

properties.Name: Great outdoor sports area
properties.description: Great place to do outdoor sports. Great paths in forest and in winter skiing paths

properties.Name: Best kebab in area
properties.description: Greatest kebab place within 50km

properties.Name: Kalmin tammi - Kalmi Oak
properties.description: Oldest tree in Turku central area. Started to grow ~1750

properties.Name: On top of Sotka
properties.description: Local Ski-center. Great views to Kauhajoki town.

properties.Name: sewing thread shop
properties.description: The biggest sewing thread shop in all nordic countries. Perfect for your grandma

properties.Name: Old air defence bunker
properties.description: One of the three places where Turku's air defence guns were located in ww2

properties.Name: Leineperin Ruukki
properties.description: Really old industrial area. Interesting buildings

properties.Name: Disk golf track
properties.description: Free to use disk golf track. If you don't have any disks, you can borrow those from local library in Teuvas center

properties.Name: Järvensivun puistoalue
properties.description: Great place to relax and enjoy the summer! You should have picnic here!

properties.Name: Littois badstrand
properties.description: Secret location to do picnics, barbecues and greek Easter hunt for varissuoans

properties.Name: Pummikalliot
properties.description: Chill spot away from sight. Access from Siltavuorenpenger

properties.Name: Brightest area in Finland
properties.description: Stay here during dark and you notice huge amount of light pollution. That is caused by huge amount of greenhouses in this area. - Or you can just google light pollution map of Finland.

properties.Name: Hyypänjokilaakso area
properties.description: Great place to drive around. Really beautiful area around Kauhajoki-river. Area is one of "Nationally important areas" of Finland

properties.Name: Yyteri Beach
properties.description: Beautiful beach

properties.Name: Old quarry pond
properties.description: This old quarry site is my go-to relaxing place in the woods next to Marjokankaantie -road. There is a very small pond surrounded by little cliffs. Also a big beautiful boulder.

properties.Name: Rock pile
properties.description: Carefully arranged pile of rocks by an local old guy during summer 2020. The guy told me that he cannot sleep during nights, so he has spent his nights by carrying stones here and arranging them into work of art.

properties.Name: A legendary kiosk
properties.description: A kiosk that has been here for over 50 years. Make sure to try the lihapiirakka (meat pie).

properties.Name: Vintage shop/motel
properties.description: Here lives old couple, who keep vintage shop in their home. All kind of odd stuff to see. They have also motel room with sauna in outdoor building. Guy owning the place is old ship captain and he tells great stories from his years on seas (in finnish)

properties.Name: Huge hole from Ice Age
properties.description: Huge hole in stone caused by Ice age.

properties.Name: Tar grave - tervahauta
properties.description: Example of tar grave which was main source of money for Finland before industrialisation.

properties.Name: Bird tower with a nice view
properties.description: Bird tower with a nice view

properties.Name: Good spot to enjoy the sunset
properties.description: Good spot to enjoy the sunset

properties.Name: Kalkkikallio (cave + fireplace)
properties.description: Small cave and an unofficial place for a campfire under a huge rock.

properties.Name: Strukan sulku
properties.description: "Strukan sulku on Suomen ainoa käytössä oleva, käsikäyttöinen merisulku. Sulun pituus on 25 metriä, leveys 8 metriä ja putouskorkeus 2 metriä." faktat wikipediast. Tunnettiin myös aikanaan pyhtään serenana koska sulkuporttien sisään saa mahtavat pyörteet

properties.Name: Kielo
properties.description: Very nice restaurant. Excellent vegetarian menu also.

properties.Name: Very nice park to hang out
Ilosaari. Here is cool place to swim or hang out.

An artificial hill with a view over Vantaa and Kerava. During the day people like to do workouts here running or walking up and down the hill. In the evenings people come here to watch the beautiful unobstructed sunsets.
properties.description: Kulomäki Hill

properties.Name: Forest Spirits
properties.description: Forest is full of cool/weird wooden creatures and no one really knows where they're coming from. Every time you go to the woods they look a little bit different and there might be few more or some of them has disappeared.

properties.Name: Big sewer tunnel
properties.description: A large tunnel that leads to metro system. It used to be open but nowadays it is closed with bars.

properties.Name: A dreamlike little flea market with some cheap Chinese trinkets, odds and ends. Good stuff if you like the kitsch aesthetic!
properties.description: Rekola China Market

properties.Name: The villa of Eliel Saarinen
properties.description: The villa is made by the famous Finnish architect Eliel Saarinen who e.g. designed the main Railway Station of Helsinki

properties.Name: Kuoleman kurvi
properties.description: A legendary sledge slope. The rumor says that in 50's-60's someone died here in a roadkill with a truck that was driving to lumenkaatopaikka.

properties.Name: Spuge aka Spurguhökkeli
properties.description: A great place for chilling

properties.Name: ABC Viitasaari
properties.description: The most beautiful ABC in Finland

properties.Name: Dorkaparkki
properties.description: Parking spot where local young people gather around to park with their cars:)

properties.Name: Toulatin vanha rallirata
properties.description: Old racing track in the middle of forest:)

properties.Name: Kahvila Myllytupa
properties.description: Tasty bread, supboarding and traktorijazzit in the summer :)

properties.Name: Koljatti
properties.description: Koljatti nature track:)

properties.Name: Secret swimming spot
properties.description: Leave your car at the end of Keijutie, walk to the shore and enjoy a sunny day at secret swimming spot:)

properties.Name: Old graveyard / Vanha Kirkkosaari
properties.description: You can visit old Kirkkosaari by boat or across the lake when it has ice on top of it. I recommend by going in the summer, because you can see all the old graves. You can borrow a boat from ABC Viitasaari.

properties.Name: Enonkosken tori / Hiekanveiston EM-kisat
properties.description: Enonkosken tori. Kisat ilmeisesti tältä vuodelta (2021) peruttu koronan vuoksi.

properties.Name: Rock paintings of Vitträsk
properties.description: There are ancient rock paintings high on a rock with an amazing view to the lake

properties.Name: Found art, sound art
properties.description: At Snellmaninkatu 16, close to the building's wall, there's two rusty ventilation ducts rising from the ground. Between the ducts you can fit your head, as if they were headphones, and listen to the sound scape in stereo.

properties.Name: A hidden bench up in a tree
properties.description: Climb up the ladder and enjoy the peltoview

properties.Name: Public swimming spot at Hannusjärvi
properties.description: The water itself is pretty eutrophic so it's not for the weak.

properties.Name: The best hidden public swimming spot in Helsinki?
properties.description: Beautiful and windy swimming spot with a tons reefs to swim to. It's located in the islands naturist area so remember to take off your clothes beforehand.

properties.Name: Public swimming spots at Vantaanjoki
properties.description: There are many piers at the coast. Just follow the paths and you'll find them.

properties.Name: A public swimming spot
properties.description: It takes a while to walk here but it's worth it!

properties.Name: Protected meadow full of all kinds of bugs
Savivuoren näkötorni
properties.description: Best place for sunsets!

properties.Name: Old harbor
properties.description: Old harbor with old boats filled with water

properties.Name: Hännilänsalmen silta
properties.description: Cool spot to hang out under the bridge

properties.Name: Hotelli Pihkuri
properties.description: Visit on 25th of December on Joulujamit! The whole town is there wasted.

properties.Name: Laajavuori
properties.description: From here you can see the whole city of Jyväskylä!

properties.Name: Neron portaat
properties.description: Walk the stairs up to Luontomuseo to see the city from a different perspective:)

properties.Name: Vesilinna Observation Tower
properties.description: Free entry

properties.Name: Pienikamari
properties.description: Cutest little shop! From here you can find gifts and doll house furniture:)

properties.Name: Puistokadun Kebab Pizzeria- Aito Döner
properties.description: Legendary pizzeria on Puistokatu!

properties.Name: Utsuvaara
properties.description: When cruising around, go see Utsuvaara chalets! Very expensive looking (and actually expensive).

properties.Name: Svedjehamn
properties.description: I recommend to drive here at the evening for a beautiful sunset! Also has a different feeling than  on daytime.

properties.Name: Tunturi- ja Näköalaravintola TUIKKU
properties.description: Best minttukaakao in the world!

properties.Name: Levin parhaat metsät
properties.description: Best powder snow for skiing in Levi!

properties.Name: Lottamaja
properties.description: Ice cream!:)

properties.Name: Legend of the bells of the church
properties.description: Legenda kertoo, että Miekkasalmeen on upotettu toisen kirkkomme alkuperäinen kello Isovihan aikaan. Lisää tästä: https://www.viitasaarenseurakunta.fi/kirkot-ja-tilat/viitasaaren-kirkko/kirkonkellot-ja-niiden-soitot

properties.Name: Vanha kääntösilta
properties.description: Beautiful little bridge:)

properties.Name: Karoliinan portaat
properties.description: https://retkipaikka.fi/karoliinan-portaat-kansanparantajan-jyrkka-oikotie-viitasaari/

properties.Name: Vanha sairaala-alue
properties.description: Lots of historic old beautiful buildings.

properties.Name: Pieni majakka kiven päällä
properties.description: Tosi symppis pienen pieni majakka kiven päällä, joka loistaa pimeällä!

properties.Name: A piece of nature with a small river running through it - Aarrepuisto
properties.description: Tucked between the buildings there is a slice of tranquil nature with a river. This used to be a hangout place for local hobos but not anymore.

properties.Name: Tähyilypaikka
properties.description: Rovaniemen kaunein auringonlasku ja -nousu kesäisin.

properties.Name: Mustan Korpin Saluuna
properties.description: Bar in the middle of nowhere / Baari keskellä metsää.

properties.Name: Hitonhauta
properties.description: Kalliorotko, joka varsinkin talvella on upea nähtävyys kun jää tekee omat muotonsa paikkaan.

properties.Name: Old bus depot filled with graffitis
properties.description: 3 buildings that are filled with graffitis, at the end of the unnamed road that starts here. Lots of broken glass but otherwise seems safe. A gate and a sign that says "no entry"

properties.Name: A viewpoint to Lahti city
properties.description: A parking place and a viewpoint. You can see lahti city from here pretty well but there are a few trees blocking the view partly.

properties.Name: A great rocky place for picnics and view to Lahti city
properties.description: Smooth rocks that are perfect for picnics

properties.Name: A park for many activities
properties.description: There are better places for stargazing but this one is good if you don't want to go that far from the city. A huge park place that has no lights. A campfire shelter, a swimming beach and lots of space to play outdoor activities for example

properties.Name: Cute place for walking dates etc.
Camping place
properties.description: Damn cool camping area to go in the summer. In the southern part of the island there is a harbor, a market and a bar

properties.Name: A lovely swimming beach and short & easy swamp routes starting here.
Amazing swim beach and a rigde path for walking. many teenagers during summer evenings
A rocky road that leads to the top of the Tornimäki hill, road starts here
properties.description: A skiing centre during the winter. Recommend to go on a clear sky sunny evening!!

properties.Name: A rocky small hill, great for evening picnics
properties.description: Smaller than Naisvuori, which is more in the centre

properties.Name: A cute place for sunsets on a hill
properties.description: Best for early summer sunsets, during midsummer the trees are on the way

properties.Name: Porkkalanniemi smooth rock beach
properties.description: Nice for photographing, sunsets, picnics, camping, relaxing

properties.Name: Viihtyisä ja syntipuhdas paikka istuskella.
properties.description: Ruttopuisto

properties.Name: Protected swamp
properties.description: A very nice swamp in Jakomäki completed with duckboard trails. Ideal for autumn walks.

properties.Name: "Riviera of Vaarala"
properties.description: Artificial bonds on the border of Vantaa and Helsinki, once a popular swimming place, still great for walks or sophisticated Finnish drinking nights in the summer

properties.Name: Awesome view
properties.description: One of the highest spots in Helsinki, a great view, ideal for sunsets.

properties.Name: Kaljaasi Ihana, Luvia
properties.description: Perinne puupurjelaiva valmistettu Luvialla 2006-2011 talkootyöllä. Traditional wooden sailing ship made in Luvia 2006-2011. https://ihana.fi/  https://fi.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kaljaasi_Ihana

properties.Name: Nirvo, Luvia
properties.description: Beatiful island in Selkämeri Nationalpark. You can find 300 years old letters on rocks.

properties.Name: Abandoned Pukkila tile factory
properties.description: Abandoned factory building with graffiti and art installations. Watch your head and step! (Outside graffiti has been cleared and there's a construction site as of Sep 2024)

properties.Name: Kajaani castle
properties.description: Castle built in the 17th century. During the 60's, clever Kainuu people built a bridge over the historic monument, it gives a nice touch to this experience.

properties.Name: Urho Kekkonen Memorial
properties.description: Monument to the ex-president of Finland, must see because it looks like just like Kekkonen (google if you don’t believe)

properties.Name: Cold storage center
properties.description: There’s a cold pool during summer and ice hole in the winter. Also dressing room and sauna available. Guest payment 5 e / paid in the mailbox in the corridor of the center and by writing name in the guest payment booklet

properties.Name: Kesäniemi beach
properties.description: Nice place for swimming

properties.Name: Vimpeli ski resort
properties.description: A ski slope in winter and nice views during summer

properties.Name: Paltaniemi beach
properties.description: The beach with shallow water, on the shores of Finland's fifth largest lake Oulujärvi

properties.Name: Kuluntalahti beach
properties.description: Nice beach with deep water

properties.Name: Vuokatti slope
properties.description: Ski resort in winter, there’s a nice view in summer on top of the vuokatti

properties.Name: Hiukka beach
properties.description: Cool swimming spot, lots of sand, feels like your outside of Finland

properties.Name: Juminkeko information centre
properties.description: A folkloristic archive of photos and audios collected especially in the Karelia, dedicated to Kalevala and Karelian culture

properties.Name: Soiva metsä
properties.description: A system of large-scale musical instruments built into the forest

properties.Name: The Quiet People
properties.description: Perhaps the most impressive work of art in the world

properties.Name: Öllöri
properties.description: One of the most popular diving destinations in Finland due to its clear waters and services

properties.Name: Värikallio
properties.description: One of the largest prehistoric rock paintings in Finland

properties.Name: Hiidenkirkko
properties.description: Big gorge, 350 meters

properties.Name: Pet cemetery
properties.description: Both old and new graves of pets. Poems, pictures and statues in memory of the once precious family members.

properties.Name: vanha moottoripyöräkerho
properties.description: hylätty kerhotalo

properties.Name: hylätty juopontalo
properties.description: sisällä paljon pullonkorkkeja, huom varo naapurin asukkaita

properties.Name: Väärämäen muumimamma
properties.description: Wooden moomin mamma statue in the middle of the forest.

properties.Name: Short railway tunnel with beautiful graffiti
Concrete foundations of an old shooting range
Häikänniemi, spot for northern lights and stargazing.
Sauna and fishermen's hut
properties.description: Old fishermen's hut and sauna

properties.Name: Kalliolampi and an island
properties.description: The small island her e has a really high east facing cliff side. Looks rather impressive

properties.Name: Repouuro cave
properties.description: One of the longest caves in Finland. Reasonably safe to explore, just avoid pushing on boulders and know your own limits. Video about the cave here https://vimeo.com/211506034

properties.Name: Tarhapuro waterfall
properties.description: Not particularly impressive when compared to Norwegian waterfalls or even the larger domestic ones, but still nice. Freezed during winters and the ice formations can be pretty if they aren't buried under snow.

properties.Name: Mätäsvaara mine
properties.description: Old mine, nowadays a  tourist attraction. More info and pictures at https://kaivostutkijat.blogaaja.fi/matasvaaran-kaivos/

properties.Name: Karhunsaari mine
properties.description: Hard to reach, full of water and mosquitos. But an interesting place nevertheless.

properties.Name: Cave and a cliff with a nice view
Out of use railway tunnel with graffiti and plants growing all around
Abandoned mine and mining facilities
properties.description: The owner doesn't like visitors and so getting there might be difficult. 2024 update, visitors are often told to piss off by the owners. Still worth visiting.

properties.Name: Scenic spot, pier
properties.description: Small aesthetic pier. Nice spot for sunsets and occasionally the northern lights

properties.Name: Old stone foundations and päivilä sanktuari
Stone foundations of a burnt house
properties.description: The place is overgrown and so it's hard to see much, but perhaps that adds to the charm.

properties.Name: Concrete foundations of a dance hall
Old railway tunnel
properties.description: There should be 2 railway tunnels here. One of them has been out of use for years and one is active. The older one got abandoned when VR started to electrify tracks and the old tunnel was too small to fit overhead power leads.

properties.Name: Beaches and abandoned holiday resort buildings
Rupakivi stone pillar in the middle of a river
Stones on the bottom of sarvisuvanto
Waterfall important to the sami people
Nice kuru with a clear and dark pond in it
Cave which has ice all year round
properties.description: Korkia maura jääluola

properties.Name: Siedi, holy place to the sami people
ww2 bunkers on top of saana
Ruins of an old mill next to a stream
properties.description: Really beautiful place, more info at https://retkipaikka.fi/onko-tama-etela-suomen-komein-koski-latokartanonkosken-kruunuja-ovat-myllynrauniot-ja-hoidettu-luontopolku/

properties.Name: Large boulder cave "dragon cave" and beautiful cliffs
properties.description: Link here https://explori.es/en/Article/8511/uudenmaan-pisin-luolasto-korkberget

properties.Name: Old tunnel with a really dark history
Ansku ironworks area
properties.description: A lot of pretty buildings

properties.Name: Cliff which offers a nice view of the castle
Wreck of a german bomber
properties.description: Wreck of a ww2 german bomber plane. Pretty cool and all but this is among the most difficult places to get to in the whole country so good luck getting there.

properties.Name: Fiellu waterfall
properties.description: A really nice waterfall. This place is hard to reach and the canyon floods during springs

properties.Name: Abandoned stone crushing place
properties.description: A scenic place especially on a summer evening where you get an overview of the harbour and can hear the ambient sound the harbour generates.

properties.Name: Abandoned industrial buildings
properties.description: A very cool collection of abandoned buildings hidden between the sportfield and the traintrack. A lot of cool graffiti. Be careful of sharp objects and building decay.

properties.Name: Finland's most southern spot
properties.description: Walking the trail all the way out here is a fun activity. You will find a few abandoned military barracks on the way here.

properties.Name: Närboden/Lähipuoti Ekholm
properties.description: Really nice self-service boutique sort of thing where you can buy fruits, honey, eggs, vegetables, Meat, Juices etc that are grown/produced in the nearby area.

properties.Name: Särkitunturi fell known for the small lake on top of it
Kafea Gufihtar
properties.description: Really nice café near Hammastunturi Wilderness-area. Great place to have your last supper before your hike.

properties.Name: Blown up bunker
properties.description: Russian built military bunker from the 1800s. Sadly destroyed before the russians left. Still quite interesting to see and imagine what the place looked like before it was reduced to rubble. Cool cliff formations close by.

properties.Name: Big boulder with ladder
properties.description: Here is a boulder in the middle of forest with a ladder so you can climb on top of it. Nearby is also a beautiful nature path with cool wooden stairs in the forest.

properties.Name: Old tar factory
properties.description: Old factory buildings.

properties.Name: Observation tower with big view
properties.description: Wooden tower with beautiful view.

properties.Name: Park with wood huts and wire slide
properties.description: Family park with lots to do.

properties.Name: Nice sandy beach
properties.description: Big beach with sand bottom and shallow warm water.

properties.Name: Sheep during summertime
properties.description: Here you can see sheep during the summertime.

properties.Name: Abandoned buildings
properties.description: Maybe an old saw mill?

properties.Name: Ancient paintings in the rock wall
properties.description: Very difficult to get to, be careful!

properties.Name: Numbers carved into stone
properties.description: Here is a year carved into stone wall. Visible by boat and when the water is low enough. The island is also pretty and uninhabited.

properties.Name: Memorial for mass drowning
properties.description: 17 people drowned in lake Päijänne in the summer of 1880, when they were coming to the Sumiainen church for a funeral.

properties.Name: Smallest opera house in Finland, La Kala
properties.description: Finnish-australian couple runs an opera house here.

properties.Name: Voted best burger grill in Finland
properties.description: For many years! You can easily find it because of the huge hamburger on top of the building.

properties.Name: Northernmost point in Finland and in EU
Beautiful nature path with geologi al facts
Point where Finland, Sweden and Norway touch each other
Skiing center that has a mountain coaster in it
From here begins a nice lakeside trail
properties.description: Just go towards the city centre from here.

properties.Name: Old tower that was used in making shot pellets
properties.description: Built in 1908, they used to drop molten lead through sieves from high up and that would form pellets.

properties.Name: Old tunnel for log driving from one lake to the other
properties.description: Usually open for walking through during summers. Seems to be closed for summer 2022. On the other end there is a cafe.

properties.Name: Legendary grill kiosk
properties.description: Super good food. Founded in 1962.

properties.Name: Old mansion built during the 18 century
properties.description: Looks super gothic and movie-like.

properties.Name: Sheep during the summer
properties.description: They eat unwanted plants from the area.

properties.Name: Starting point of nature preservation area with pathway through it
properties.description: Pretty and untouched. Lots of duckwalks and bridges.

properties.Name: Starting point of nature path
properties.description: In the path you can find a small cable ferry that you can pull by yourself! The island where the ferry goes has a nice fireplace and a traditional finnish outhouse toilet, "huussi".

properties.Name: Biggest railway bridge made of stone in Finland
properties.description: Koskenmäki bridge was built in 1924.

properties.Name: Petäjävesi old church, part of Unesco world heritage sites
properties.description: Built in 1764 and has kept its original looks quite well.

properties.Name: One of the points in the Struve Geodetic Arc, wooden tower with big view
properties.description: The system was designed to measure the first accurate measurement of a meridian arc.

properties.Name: Summer cafe with alpacas and sheep
properties.description: It's free to visit!

properties.Name: Office building of a magazine that publishes articles concerning ufo's, the paranormal and occult subjects
properties.description: The magazine's name is Ultra.

properties.Name: Memorial for victims of a collision of a bus and a truck, the most serious traffic accident in Finland to date
properties.description: The bus was full of young people going north for skiing holiday. It collided with a truck loaded with huge and heavy paper rolls. The truck driver lost control of the vehicle because the road was icy. 23 died and 14 were injured.

properties.Name: Abandoned hotel
properties.description: Lomakouhero

properties.Name: Beautiful headland
properties.description: From here you can see some small bits of Vaasa, But that's not the appeal. The appeal is how calm and quiet the place is at all times.

properties.Name: Old abandoned shipyard
properties.description: the old shipyards of Palosaari are located here. They are an interesting piece of Vaasa's history.

properties.Name: Norrskär
properties.description: This place has a beautiful lighthouse and a lot of houses where fishermen, whalers and the lighthouse keeper lived. There is also some old ruins of fortifications on the island. Getting there is a hassle although some people do offer ribboat rides and such there

properties.Name: Hoviska
properties.description: A place where people of all ages from Vaasa like to gather on warm summer evenings to look out to the sea and enjoy a drink or two. The name is short for hovioikeus which is the big building

properties.Name: Louhos
properties.description: an old quarry filled with water. People like swimming there as the still water is quite warm. There is also big cliffsides people like jumping off of. Although that can be unsafe.

properties.Name: The Haltiala farm (Haltialan kotieläintila) is like a piece of the Finnish countryside, featuring various domestic animals. No entry fee whatsoever.
properties.description: Haltiala farm

properties.Name: Urtashotelli
properties.description: An old shed build for fishing in 1959, which is not maintained by Metsähallitus but by the visitors. Interesting place to have lunch in!

properties.Name: Tiuru abandoned hospital
properties.description: Cool 8-floor hospital that  you can explore (It's illegal) but fun

properties.Name: A place where all the local hobos come to drink beer
properties.description: Few sofas and tables are gathered on the grass and usually on beautiful evenings there are few older men drinking beer and chattin about

properties.Name: hylätty päiväkotirakennus
properties.description: aikalailla rikottu sisältä

properties.Name: Svartholman merilinnoitus
properties.description: Similar to Suomenlinna in Helsinki. Great place to visit on summer. You can buy boat-ticket in website in advance.

properties.Name: Puumaja
properties.description: Mäntyyn rakennettu tukeva puumaja. Ylhäällä majassa myös mukava puinen keinu, ja vieressä nuotiopaikka!

properties.Name: Out of use railroad tracks and a tunnel
Korkeakoski Waterfall
properties.description: One of the largest waterfalls in Finland.

properties.Name: Wiggly river
properties.description: The river keeps changing its route. Would be fun to paddle through.

properties.Name: Vallamin uimaranta
properties.description: Kaunis kirkasvetinen uimalouhos hypittävillä kallioilla

properties.Name: Tibetan Art Centre
properties.description: https://www.tiibetintaiteenkeskus.fi/

properties.Name: McDonald's Rovaniemi Lampela
properties.description: World's northernmost McDonald's. Title regained after the one in Murmansk was rebranded.

properties.Name: Cool creek flowing trough lush forest
Korkeakoski waterfall
properties.description: Waterfall flowing from drain pipe. Best to see in springtime after snow has melted. Benches nearby

properties.Name: Abandoned Ski Jumping Slope
properties.description: Steep hill with old wooden steps. Legendary Finnish Ski Jumper Matti Nykänen started his career from this place

properties.Name: Swingin boulder / Heiluva kivi
properties.description: Alarge boulder that can be moved by hand if lifted from the right point

properties.Name: Little shop in an old granary shed, Sumiaisten Aittatori
properties.description: They make excellent sour rye bread loaves! Also available are other local foods and handcrafts. Open during summers only.

properties.Name: Animal Park Ysitien Lemmikki
properties.description: It has a little island full of bunnies! Open during summers only.

properties.Name: Amusement Park Nokkakiven Huvipuisto
properties.description: Amusement park that has seen it's best days. Free entry. Rides are old and bought used which gives the park it's own vibe. In the service station next door you can find old arcade machines which don't work. Recommended!

properties.Name: Elf forest and forest trails
properties.description: Local people have brought elf statues and dolls here, also lots of trails to walk on.

properties.Name: Abandoned boats from the 90s
properties.description: Abandoned boats grounded on shallow water. Reachable in winter by walking over the ice. Not reachable by most boats due to shallow water.

properties.Name: Island made out of 200+ year old junk
properties.description: Island made out of bricks, foreign rocks, scraps, old bottles and other stuff from the 1700s and 1800s. Ships heading for Porvoo would often dump their ballast here. You might found some rare stuff here even!

properties.Name: Penis shaped river
properties.description: When viewed from above it looks very suggestive. (it's even got veins and emission)

properties.Name: Stargazing vantage point
properties.description: Best place in finland to see and photograph the Milky Way galaxy. No light pollution. Best time of the year is late august or september where it will be straight south after the sun has set fully with no twilight.

properties.Name: Island with viking grave
properties.description: Get to the top of the island to find it. (It's already been looted centuries ago so it's better to just look and not touch)

properties.Name: Oddly formed lake
properties.description: Scenic lake for swimming and relaxing. Natural lagoon to park your boat in west of it.

properties.Name: Old quarry lake with long beach
properties.description: Warm and clear water in summer. 500m long beach and very little algae bloom.

properties.Name: Very steep and tall rocky island
properties.description: Quite small yet 40 meters high at its highest point with great views! Be careful when climbing up so you don't fall! (Not to be confused with Bornholm, Denmark)

properties.Name: Old quarry lake
properties.description: Easily accesible by boat with a dug lagoon to park your boat in. Beware, the lake gets deep quickly!

properties.Name: Island split between finland and sweden
properties.description: It also has the world's shortest land border in the south where the border runs over an inlet and then back on land before going out to sea again. it's 30-50 meters long depending on the tide.

properties.Name: WW2 military base, now a museum
properties.description: Örö is a strategically located island which was used in WW2 to defend against the Soviet Invasion of finland. Beware of snakes!

properties.Name: The north pole
properties.description: Santa does not live here. Please go to Korvatunturi for that

properties.Name: Easternmost point of Finland
properties.description: This is the furthest east you can go before entering Russia

properties.Name: Gullkrona Island, great food and nature trail
properties.description: One of the best fish soups in the archipelago and nice vantage point on the natrure trail

properties.Name: Brännskär
properties.description: Great beer and café. Also good place to do glamping

properties.Name: Highest point in the archipelago (non-Åland)
properties.description: 64 meter high rocky hill with great 360 degree views

properties.Name: The best pizza in the archipelago
properties.description: Najaden is known for their pizzas. You can also have great beers here too!

properties.Name: Själö 1700s mental hospital museum
properties.description: A nice looking mansion building that used to be a mental hospital

properties.Name: Grocery store with pizzeria
properties.description: This K-Supermarket makes pizza with its own wood stove!

properties.Name: Huge quarry
properties.description: Huge quarry where famous Kuru granite has been extracted

properties.Name: Site of Kokemäki oven murder
properties.description: A man killed his wife by burying her possibly alive inside the large wood fired oven (1960) The house is demolished but some remains of the building are still there

properties.Name: Luistari bronze age graveyard
properties.description: One of Finland's most remarkable archeological sites where multiple findings such as a massive sword and the suit of Euran emäntä, a national icon.

properties.Name: Abandoned mental hospital
properties.description: Abandoned mental hospital, randomly guarded, not recommended to go inside due to broken glass and fires that occurred have possibly made the buildings dangerous and unsafe.

properties.Name: An old gold mine
properties.description: Haveri gold mine was operational until 1960s and is now a popular scuba diving location

properties.Name: A cool fishing spot
properties.description: Cool fishing spot with two partially-sunk jetties in water and a peninsula which extends to Lohiluoma bay

properties.Name: Alajoen lintutorni
properties.description: Täällä voi ihailla lakeutta ja katella lintuja - Here you can see the beautiful flat field landscape of Ostrobothnia and see some birds

properties.Name: A wartime munitions storage site, with molds and a huge oven in place. Exploring the whole cave takes about 1-2 hours. DO NOT GO HERE, unless you are able-bodied. The entrance is dangerous, and there's no cell-service in the cave (duh)
properties.description: Underground Munitions Site

properties.Name: Sunken dock
properties.description: Old sunken boat dock behind parking lot

properties.Name: Vanhat sillat metsässä
properties.description: Kaksi vanhaa sillan runkoa keskellä metsää

properties.Name: Kiikunlähde
properties.description: Finland's largest spring pool

properties.Name: Orhinselkä
properties.description: YLE said that being here is like being in Croatia. Can't argue w that.

properties.Name: Kivijärven uimaranta
properties.description: The best swimming spot.

properties.Name: Alpo Jaakola Sculpture Park
properties.description: Interesting and mystical sculptures amidst woods

properties.Name: Luolavuoren pääluola
properties.description: A nice little cave for some claustrophobic vibes.  Bring some warm and durable and a headlamp.  Watch out for the tightest caverns,  could be dangerous for inexperienced. Good pplace to enjoy the darkness, also a nice cool pplace on a hot summer day.

properties.Name: Small beach
properties.description: A lovely calm little swimming spot, usually not many people here. Beautiful sunsets.

properties.Name: Haihara Art Centre
properties.description: A lovely historical place. An old manor and wooden buildings in the area. Lots to experience in the summertime; there are exhibitions, a café, park concerts and a handicraft shop. No entry fee.

properties.Name: Hauho old village road and stone church built around 1400s
Huge landfill area turned into a park
properties.description: A good place for a relaxing walk or for running the stairs up and down. Great view in summertime

properties.Name: Niinikota
properties.description: Nice, big campfire hut with a toilet and firewood

properties.Name: Observation tower
properties.description: observation tower on a hill

properties.Name: Uhrilähde
properties.description: "Sacrificial" spring that was considered sacred and people sacrificed food and valuables to it.

properties.Name: Kankaanpään taidekoulun galleria
properties.description: Kankaanpää art school with a gallery that has very cool exhibitions you should visit :)

properties.Name: Pomarkku silta
properties.description: Very cute spot with bridge, rapids and wooden houses

properties.Name: Mallinkaisten retkeilyalue
properties.description: Nice hiking trails by a lake

properties.Name: Hidden waterfall
properties.description: Hidden waterfall called "Hörhänkosken putous" in the middle of the forest. No path leading to the falls so you have to go through a dense forest.

properties.Name: Esan petäjä, over 300 yo hollow tree
properties.description: Here starts about 0,5km hiking trail to Esan petäjä. It is over 300 years old hollow tree standing.

properties.Name: Konttivuoren luontopolku
properties.description: 1,5km hiking trail in Höytiä, Uurainen.

properties.Name: "Big rock" Great swimming spot
properties.description: Absolute best swimming spot, you can recognise the place by big rock. Clear water.
